untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of: (1) custom trendline construction and dynamic trendline breaks (not available as standard indicators), (2) buying climax detection (behavioral signal requiring pattern recognition), (3) consolidation period quality assessment (requires custom duration + volatility logic). The pivot point used as proxy for trendline, but true trendline geometry cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. RSI overbought (>70) approximates post-climax state.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires custom trendline drawing and pattern detection unavailable in the indicator library. A partial approximation uses: pivot as trendline proxy, rsi_14 > 70 for overbought/climax detection, and crosses_above pivot for entry trigger. However, this loses the critical elements of: (a) explicit trendline break to downside followed by recovery, (b) consolidation duration validation, (c) stop placement 'below break bar low' which requires bar-by-bar trendline tracking. Recommend implementing as custom rule in backtest engine with explicit trendline support.
